name_en: In Stock: Chanel✨ New Champagne Gold CF
name_cn:
In Stock: Chanel✨ New Champagne Gold CF
Glistening and shiny 🤩 Absolutely stunning! Classic silhouette + Champagne gold, sophisticated! Shimmers in different lights, beautiful from every angle. Special craftsmanship used; though it's lambskin, you don't need to worry about scratches as this leather is very durable. Versatile style, suitable for both casual and formal wear.
Size 25cm,
Number 112 Gold Pearl Lambskin
